headline: Luka Vuskovic
body: Luka Vuskovic is set to stay at Brighton; no exit is planned at this stage.
text:
🚨🔵⚪️ More on exclusive story about new bid from Brighton to Spurs for Luka Vuskovic.

Proposal worth £42m plus £3m add-ons, as revealed — also understand Vušković keen on the deal to find more space and play regularly.

#BHAFC and #THFC remain locked in negotiations.
draft_caption:
CONTRACT EXTENSION | Luka Vuskovic

Luka Vuskovic is set to stay at Brighton; no exit is planned at this stage.

#FPLVortex #Transfers #BHAFC #PremierLeague
